name: footprint
title: Footprint — Digital Identity Auditor
description: Enterprise-grade digital footprint auditor. Discovers which online services and platforms are associated with a given email address for identity verification, fraud prevention, and corporate security assessments.

input.title: Footprint Input
input.description: Configure the email address to audit and optional proxy settings.

email.title: Email Address
email.description: The target email address to audit for associated online accounts and digital footprint.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify proxy configuration. Recommended for production runs to avoid rate limiting.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Using proxies significantly reduces the chance of being rate-limited by target services.

onlyUsed.title: Only Show Found Accounts
onlyUsed.description: If enabled, the output dataset will only contain services where an associated account was positively identified.
